reason: Make ToolStatus Schema-backed and export the schema so it can be validated against EventStatus
Use exported ToolStatusSchema instead of duplicate internal StatusSchema, reducing duplication
Add permission_denied detection for Permission/Question tagged errors via _tag property, avoiding circular imports
Also check toolStatus property so that tool.execute.after events with toolStatus in their properties get mapped to RuntimeEvent.status
Add toolStatus from TypedResult metadata to tool.execute.after properties for builtin tools
Add status to tool.execute.after properties for MCP tools
Remove lane-6 instruction block that was appended by mistaken fragment consolidation — edits were already applied directly
Remove lane-6 fragment text that was appended as comments instead of being applied as actual code edits
Replace unconditional finishToolCall(status:completed) with conditional that checks metadata.toolStatus — denied/cancelled/failed results route to error path instead of always being marked completed
Remove lane-6 fragment text that was incorrectly consolidated into tools.ts
Remove fragment text that starts after export statement
Fix mangled export line and remove remaining fragment text from tools.ts
